title: Senior Teacher - IIM Calcutta - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - IIM Calcutta - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
IIM Calcutta, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Teacher for our Varanasi operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About IIM Calcutta:
IIM Calcutta is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Support students with special educational needs
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual performance appraisal
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IIM Calcutta!
